name: exyconn-mail
description: Exyconn Mail - Email service and management application

scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:server
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ui && npm run lint:server
scripts.format: npm run format:ui && npm run format:server
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:ui && npm run format:check:server
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ui && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
